# primepm Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-05-09

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 5.7 (frontend, React 19 + Vite 6); TypeScript on Deno (Supabase Edge Functions) + `@supabase/supabase-js` ^2.105 (frontend auth client), Supabase Auth (GoTrue) for OAuth/JWT/identity linking, Hono on Deno for the edge function, Prisma 7 for migrations against Supabase Postgres, Tailwind 4 for styling, Zod 4 for request validation in the new edge route (001-google-oauth-login)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.7 (frontend, React 19 + Vite 6); TypeScript on Deno (Supabase Edge Functions): Follow standard conventions

## Recent Changes

- 001-google-oauth-login: Added TypeScript 5.7 (frontend, React 19 + Vite 6); TypeScript on Deno (Supabase Edge Functions) + `@supabase/supabase-js` ^2.105 (frontend auth client), Supabase Auth (GoTrue) for OAuth/JWT/identity linking, Hono on Deno for the edge function, Prisma 7 for migrations against Supabase Postgres, Tailwind 4 for styling, Zod 4 for request validation in the new edge route
